mapper.select:
select * from SYNLTE.STANDARDIZE_UNIT_MANAGE where P_UNIT_CODE = #{parentUnitCode}
and ( upper(UNIT_NAME) like upper(concat('%', concat(#{searchText}, '%'))) or upper(UNIT_CODE) like upper(concat('%', concat(#{searchText}, '%'))) )

select * from SYNLTE.STANDARDIZE_UNIT_MANAGE
( upper(UNIT_NAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))) or upper(UNIT_CODE) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))) )
and UNIT_TYPE = #{unitType}
and UNIT_LEVEL in (
select #{item} from dual
)
order by UNIT_LEVEL ${sortOrder} nulls last
mapper.update: update SYNLTE.STANDARDIZE_UNIT_MANAGE set UNIT_NAME = #{unitName}, UNIT_TYPE = #{unitType}, UNIT_LEVEL = #{unitLevel}, P_UNIT_CODE = #{parentUnitCode}, P_UNIT_NAME = #{parentUnitName}, MEMO = #{memo}, UPDATE_TIME = sysdate where UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode}
